# Task 1.
$V_{average}=\frac{\Delta s}{\Delta t}$
$\vec{V}_{average}=\frac{\Delta  \vec{r}}{\Delta t}=\frac{\vec{r_{2}}-\vec{r}_{1}}{\Delta t}$

Given:

A --------- B
       s
A -> B $V_{1}=50 \frac{km}{h}$
B -> A $V_{2}=40 \frac{km}{h}$ $V_{avg}=?$

$V_{avg}=\frac{2s}{t_{1}+t_{2}}$
$t_{1}=A\to B$
$t_{2}=B\to A$

$V_{avg}=\frac{2s}{\frac{s}{V_{1}}+\frac{s}{V_{2}}}=\frac{2}{\frac{1}{V_{1}}+\frac{1}{V_{2}}}=\frac{2v_{1}v_{2}}{v_{1}+v_{2}}$
$=44.44 \frac{km}{h}$

$V_{avg}=\frac{2V_{1}}{\frac{V_{1}}{V_{2}}+1}\implies V_{avg}<2V_{1}$

# task 2
$A\to B:V_{1}$
$V_{avg}=2V_{1}$
$V_{2}=?$
$2V_{1}=\frac{2V_{1}}{1+\frac{V_{1}}{\underbrace{ V_{2} }_{ \infty }}}$
# task3
The ship traveled 2km to the east
Given
$S_{1}=2km\to$ →east
$S_{2}=5km\to$  ↑north
$S_{3}=5km$ NE
$\Delta t_{1 23}=1h$

r0 i0
2 i0
2 i5
$2+\frac{5}{\sqrt{ 2 }}+i\left( 5-\frac{5}{\sqrt{ 2 }} \right)$

Re 5.535533905932738
Im 1.464466094067262
mod
5.72597559935454

$V_{avg}=\frac{5.72km/h}{3h}=1.9km/h$

sheep
